textByHash.018e4c9b2f29cbbd64791e3237e25c5394222059: We serve Crombwick's finest Bloody Bracer, that is all.
textByHash.4e3f118eb8df37b6c3ba19fa0685dcf5d3368bce: It's an old recipe of the Crombwick family.
textByHash.b48758a9935edfbcdcab1a220a5f6968fe09a6f7: Yes, but what I mean is, why do you want to know?
textByHash.db0290a8635df08d15c4c7f29bfe844de158c290: My supplier is a private individual. He doesn't like others meddling in his affairs. So yes, it does matter.
textByHash.26735100f973daa04559f7305ef72a33f99defd0: Health? What are you on about?
textByHash.c5087252f2300bf7b727f2ab2af0a22c671bf960: I don't know what you're on about. There're no routine inspections here. Now clear off, I have customers to serve!
textByHash.1d083a8de456ba13a44422c03db25bd4f1d2464e: You don't give up do you. I'm not telling you anything so clear off.
textByHash.1132ed3b98ed2e308b26f25a97a8f70d51c91a20: Huh. Looks like we're all out of Bloody Bracer again.
textByHash.7d0ebcd001f29d619ba4d42ba41ccfcee27de7a0: Kroy. We've run out of Bloody Bracer again.
textByHash.ef1c6d3168be670cfd729d9775e6c25c3c5cc96e: There's something else as well. Someone's been poking around, asking about Bloody Bracer.
textByHash.948a26fe88ef963d557443cae216fa99a4b7de23: I don't know. They don't look to be from around here.
textByHash.f00c84396790d0f4e192b778c50368fe39e1071e: I... I thought you'd want to know.
textByHash.a96ce091094501d4d82e1e15cbf653172d095a95: Hey! I don't need to help you!
textByHash.13dd9772c4cbcc4377828f6967855c480fac3b48: I said 99 coins! You haven't got 99 coins!
textByHash.387c3ae43357694c875311194a3c45d7ddb937bf: What can I say? The ingredients are locally sourced so it's high quality, I promise.
textByHash.e180ce1268e99fa4c7f926c44c54ecee3f94faa6: I've not been here long myself, so I'm afraid I may not be of much help.
textByHash.11157b0cdce5b77238a9663ee1a6bc795e17c8d1: Ha ha! We, err, don't see many of those types around here. No, no, not at all.
textByHash.e284d7f9d3d9f961cd6d8aaeb4251f7be59884ce: Oh, the red thirst will be upon you soon.
